title: scleria costata
intro: Scleria costata, also known as the Yellow Sedge or Yellow-awn Sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scleria costata include relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Scleria costata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
